---
title: "Downscaling"
toc: true
---

```{=html}
<div style="max-width:960px;margin:2rem auto;padding:0 1.5rem;">

  <span class="section-label">Metodología y resultados</span>
  <h2 style="color:#003087;font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">Downscaling estadístico</h2>
  <p style="color:#4a5568;margin-bottom:1.5rem;">
    El algoritmo de análogos sinópticos proporciona precipitación diaria en una malla de 5×5 km (20.945 celdas) sobre la Península Ibérica e Islas Baleares, a partir de datos de baja resolución de los modelos de predicción estacional.
  </p>

  <!-- Descripción metodológica -->
  <div class="grid-2" style="margin-bottom:2rem;">
    <div class="info-card">
      <h3>Fase 1 · Calibración</h3>
      <p>Clasificación de tipos de tiempo mediante <em>K-means clustering</em> para identificar la base de datos sinóptica de referencia (1981–1996). La similitud se calcula a partir de distancias euclídeas ponderadas de las componentes del viento geostrófico en superficie y a 500 hPa (ERA5).</p>
    </div>
    <div class="info-card">
      <h3>Fase 2 · Estimación</h3>
      <p>La precipitación para cada celda se estima como la media ponderada de la precipitación asociada a las situaciones más análogas de la base de referencia, usando la similitud de los campos de viento geostrófico en superficie y a 500 hPa de los modelos C3S.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ============================================================ -->
  <!-- DESPLEGABLES POR MODELO                                       -->
  <!-- ============================================================ -->
  <h3 style="color:#003087;margin-top:2.5rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">Resultados por modelo</h3>
  <p style="font-size:0.85rem;color:#4a5568;margin-bottom:1rem;">Período de validez: <strong>AMJ 2026</strong> · Lead: marzo 2026</p>

  <div class="accordion" id="accordion-modelos">

    <!-- ECMWF -->
    <div class="accordion-item">
      <h2 class="accordion-header">
        <button class="accordion-button" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#mod-ecmwf">
          ECMWF-SEAS5.1
        </button>
      </h2>
      <div id="mod-ecmwf" class="accordion-collapse collapse show" data-bs-parent="#accordion-modelos">
        <div class="accordion-body">
          <div class="grid-2">
            <div>
              <img src="images/downscaling/3_terciles_ecmwf_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="Terciles ECMWF"/>
              <p class="img-caption">Probabilidad por terciles · Precipitación · AMJ 2026</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <img src="images/downscaling/4_corr-spearman_ecmwf_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="Correlación ECMWF"/>
              <p class="img-caption">Correlación de Spearman · AMJ 2026</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <img src="images/downscaling/5_roc_3_pr_ecmwf_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="ROC ECMWF"/>
              <p class="img-caption">Curvas ROC · Precipitación · AMJ 2026</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <img src="images/downscaling/6_rps_pr_ecmwf_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="RPS ECMWF"/>
              <p class="img-caption">Ranked Probability Score (RPS) · AMJ 2026</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <img src="images/downscaling/7_bs_3_pr_ecmwf_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="BS ECMWF"/>
              <p class="img-caption">Brier Score · AMJ 2026</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- DWD -->
    <div class="accordion-item">
      <h2 class="accordion-header">
        <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#mod-dwd">
          DWD
        </button>
      </h2>
      <div id="mod-dwd" class="accordion-collapse collapse" data-bs-parent="#accordion-modelos">
        <div class="accordion-body">
          <div class="grid-2">
            <div>
              <img src="images/downscaling/3_terciles_dwd_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="Terciles DWD"/>
              <p class="img-caption">Probabilidad por terciles · Precipitación · AMJ 2026</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <img src="images/downscaling/4_corr-spearman_dwd_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="Correlación DWD"/>
              <p class="img-caption">Correlación de Spearman · AMJ 2026</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <img src="images/downscaling/5_roc_3_pr_dwd_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="ROC DWD"/>
              <p class="img-caption">Curvas ROC · Precipitación · AMJ 2026</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <img src="images/downscaling/6_rps_pr_dwd_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="RPS DWD"/>
              <p class="img-caption">Ranked Probability Score (RPS) · AMJ 2026</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <img src="images/downscaling/7_bs_3_pr_dwd_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="BS DWD"/>
              <p class="img-caption">Brier Score · AMJ 2026</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- CMCC -->
    <div class="accordion-item">
      <h2 class="accordion-header">
        <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#mod-cmcc">
          CMCC
        </button>
      </h2>
      <div id="mod-cmcc" class="accordion-collapse collapse" data-bs-parent="#accordion-modelos">
        <div class="accordion-body">
          <div class="grid-2">
            <div>
              <img src="images/downscaling/3_terciles_cmcc_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="Terciles CMCC"/>
              <p class="img-caption">Probabilidad por terciles · Precipitación · AMJ 2026</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <img src="images/downscaling/4_corr-spearman_cmcc_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="Correlación CMCC"/>
              <p class="img-caption">Correlación de Spearman · AMJ 2026</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <img src="images/downscaling/5_roc_3_pr_cmcc_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="ROC CMCC"/>
              <p class="img-caption">Curvas ROC · Precipitación · AMJ 2026</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <img src="images/downscaling/6_rps_pr_cmcc_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="RPS CMCC"/>
              <p class="img-caption">Ranked Probability Score (RPS) · AMJ 2026</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <img src="images/downscaling/7_bs_3_pr_cmcc_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="BS CMCC"/>
              <p class="img-caption">Brier Score · AMJ 2026</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Météo-France -->
    <div class="accordion-item">
      <h2 class="accordion-header">
        <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#mod-mf">
          Météo-France
        </button>
      </h2>
      <div id="mod-mf" class="accordion-collapse collapse" data-bs-parent="#accordion-modelos">
        <div class="accordion-body">
          <div class="grid-2">
            <div>
              <img src="images/downscaling/3_terciles_meteo_france_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="Terciles Météo-France"/>
              <p class="img-caption">Probabilidad por terciles · Precipitación · AMJ 2026</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <img src="images/downscaling/4_corr-spearman_meteo_france_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="Correlación Météo-France"/>
              <p class="img-caption">Correlación de Spearman · AMJ 2026</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <img src="images/downscaling/5_roc_3_pr_meteo_france_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="ROC Météo-France"/>
              <p class="img-caption">Curvas ROC · Precipitación · AMJ 2026</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <img src="images/downscaling/6_rps_pr_meteo_france_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="RPS Météo-France"/>
              <p class="img-caption">Ranked Probability Score (RPS) · AMJ 2026</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <img src="images/downscaling/7_bs_3_pr_meteo_france_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="BS Météo-France"/>
              <p class="img-caption">Brier Score · AMJ 2026</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div><!-- fin accordion-modelos -->


  <!-- ============================================================ -->
  <!-- DESPLEGABLES POR TIPO DE GRÁFICO                              -->
  <!-- ============================================================ -->
  <h3 style="color:#003087;margin-top:3rem;margin-bottom:1rem;">Resultados por tipo de gráfico</h3>

  <div class="accordion" id="accordion-graficos">

    <!-- Terciles -->
    <div class="accordion-item">
      <h2 class="accordion-header">
        <button class="accordion-button" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#graf-terciles">
          Probabilidad por terciles
        </button>
      </h2>
      <div id="graf-terciles" class="accordion-collapse collapse show" data-bs-parent="#accordion-graficos">
        <div class="accordion-body">
          <div class="grid-2">
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/3_terciles_ecmwf_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="ECMWF"/><p class="img-caption">ECMWF-SEAS5.1</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/3_terciles_dwd_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="DWD"/><p class="img-caption">DWD</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/3_terciles_cmcc_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="CMCC"/><p class="img-caption">CMCC</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/3_terciles_meteo_france_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="Météo-France"/><p class="img-caption">Météo-France</p></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Correlación Spearman -->
    <div class="accordion-item">
      <h2 class="accordion-header">
        <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#graf-corr">
          Correlación de Spearman
        </button>
      </h2>
      <div id="graf-corr" class="accordion-collapse collapse" data-bs-parent="#accordion-graficos">
        <div class="accordion-body">
          <div class="grid-2">
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/4_corr-spearman_ecmwf_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="ECMWF"/><p class="img-caption">ECMWF-SEAS5.1</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/4_corr-spearman_dwd_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="DWD"/><p class="img-caption">DWD</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/4_corr-spearman_cmcc_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="CMCC"/><p class="img-caption">CMCC</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/4_corr-spearman_meteo_france_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="Météo-France"/><p class="img-caption">Météo-France</p></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ROC -->
    <div class="accordion-item">
      <h2 class="accordion-header">
        <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#graf-roc">
          Curvas ROC
        </button>
      </h2>
      <div id="graf-roc" class="accordion-collapse collapse" data-bs-parent="#accordion-graficos">
        <div class="accordion-body">
          <div class="grid-2">
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/5_roc_3_pr_ecmwf_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="ECMWF"/><p class="img-caption">ECMWF-SEAS5.1</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/5_roc_3_pr_dwd_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="DWD"/><p class="img-caption">DWD</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/5_roc_3_pr_cmcc_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="CMCC"/><p class="img-caption">CMCC</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/5_roc_3_pr_meteo_france_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="Météo-France"/><p class="img-caption">Météo-France</p></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- RPS -->
    <div class="accordion-item">
      <h2 class="accordion-header">
        <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#graf-rps">
          Ranked Probability Score (RPS)
        </button>
      </h2>
      <div id="graf-rps" class="accordion-collapse collapse" data-bs-parent="#accordion-graficos">
        <div class="accordion-body">
          <div class="grid-2">
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/6_rps_pr_ecmwf_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="ECMWF"/><p class="img-caption">ECMWF-SEAS5.1</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/6_rps_pr_dwd_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="DWD"/><p class="img-caption">DWD</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/6_rps_pr_cmcc_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="CMCC"/><p class="img-caption">CMCC</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/6_rps_pr_meteo_france_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="Météo-France"/><p class="img-caption">Météo-France</p></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Brier Score -->
    <div class="accordion-item">
      <h2 class="accordion-header">
        <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#graf-bs">
          Brier Score
        </button>
      </h2>
      <div id="graf-bs" class="accordion-collapse collapse" data-bs-parent="#accordion-graficos">
        <div class="accordion-body">
          <div class="grid-2">
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/7_bs_3_pr_ecmwf_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="ECMWF"/><p class="img-caption">ECMWF-SEAS5.1</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/7_bs_3_pr_dwd_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="DWD"/><p class="img-caption">DWD</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/7_bs_3_pr_cmcc_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="CMCC"/><p class="img-caption">CMCC</p></div>
            <div><img src="images/downscaling/7_bs_3_pr_meteo_france_lead032026_AMJ.png" class="result-img" alt="Météo-France"/><p class="img-caption">Météo-France</p></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div><!-- fin accordion-graficos -->


  <!-- ============================================================ -->
  <!-- INFORME PDF                                                    -->
  <!-- ============================================================ -->
  <h3 style="color:#003087;margin-top:3rem;margin-bottom:0.8rem;">Informe de verificación</h3>
  <p style="font-size:0.85rem;color:#4a5568;margin-bottom:1rem;">
    Informe completo de verificación estacional · AMJ 2026 ·
    <a href="images/downscaling/verificacion_estacional_AMJ_2026.pdf" download style="color:#0072bc;font-weight:600;">
      ↓ Descargar PDF
    </a>
  </p>

  <div class="pdf-container">
    <iframe src="images/downscaling/verificacion_estacional_AMJ_2026.pdf"
            width="100%" height="100%" style="border:none;">
      Tu navegador no soporta la visualización de PDF.
      <a href="images/downscaling/verificacion_estacional_AMJ_2026.pdf">Descargar aquí</a>
    </iframe>
  </div>

</div>
```
